site.title: Quest4You - Discover Yourself! | Self-Discovery & Compatibility Quizzes
site.description: Self-discovery quizzes about sexuality, fetishes and compatibility. Find out who you are and connect with compatible people. 100% free and anonymous.

banner.experimentalDesc: This platform is in testing phase. Some features may be under development.

hero.title: Discover Yourself!
hero.subtitle: Self-discovery quizzes about sexuality, fetishes and compatibility
hero.smartMatchDesc: Answer the quizzes and discover people with compatible interests!
hero.smartMatchHint: 🔮 Our algorithm analyzes your answers and suggests connections with people who share the same tastes

howItWorks.title: How Does It Work?
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your free account in seconds
howItWorks.step2Desc: Complete the quizzes at your own pace

quizzes.title: 📋 Available Quizzes
quizzes.subtitle: Each quiz reveals a different facet of you • All 100% free!
quizzes.loginNotice: To answer the quizzes, you need to create an account or sign in.

modal.authDesc: To answer the quizzes and discover compatible people, you need to have an account.

resultDesc.veryHigh: You have a very high level in this area! Your results show great interest and openness.
resultDesc.high: You have a healthy curiosity and are open to exploring this area in moderation.
resultDesc.medium: You have a moderate interest in this area. You can explore more at your own pace.
resultDesc.low: This area isn't particularly of interest to you, but you keep an open mind.
resultDesc.veryLow: This area doesn't seem to be of interest to you right now. And that's perfectly fine!
